docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANTONIO, ANASTACIO AS TO DEFENDANT AURORA'S JANITORIAL SERVICES, INC. DBA CONSOLIDATED BUILDING SERVICES, INC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
